title: Cayenne Silky Russian Beets Soup
description: A velvety, tangy beet soup with a fiery kick of cayenne, served steaming and vegan-friendly.
instructions: Steam the diced beets in a medium pot for 15 minutes until tender, then set aside to cool slightly.
Heat 1 Tbsp of oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté onion and garlic until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add carrot and parsnip, cooking for 5 minutes until they begin to soften.
Return the beets to the pot, then pour in vegetable broth and add vinegar, cayenne, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes to meld flavors.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until silky smooth. (Alternatively, blend in batches in a blender.)
Stir in coconut cream and chopped dill, adjusting seasoning if needed.
Heat through gently, ensuring the soup does not boil to preserve the silky texture.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh dill sprigs if desired.
